name: Tad the Lost Explorer
short_description: Your favourite explorer, Tad Stones is back! Embark with Tad and his friends on a new journey through different cities where you will encounter challenging puzzles in your quest to get the emerald tablet.
detailed_description:
JOIN TAD IN THE QUEST FOR THE EMERALD TABLET!

The lost explorer, Tad, is once again on a whole new adventure! A mysterious curse will take you through the cities of Veracruz, Chicago, Paris and Cairo on an epic journey to find the emerald tablet and save your friends.

Have a great time with Tad and his companions in this 3D action video game, where you will face intricate puzzles, survive crazy adversities, and help your friends.

AND ALSO... IT INCLUDES A NEW ORIGINAL ADVENTURE IN THE CANARY ISLANDS!

The lost diary of pirate Amaro Pargo will take Tadeo on a journey across the eight Canary Islands in an epic adventure where nothing is what it seems and each island holds a piece of the puzzle.

You'll travel through volcanic landscapes, impossible trails, and real places that hide ancient stories, as you get closer to the greatest discovery of your career: the true meaning of the Sun of the West.

Have a great time with Tadeo and his friends with 9 original levels that expand the original video game with new areas and puzzles that include new stamps and cultural postcards. Take on challenges inspired by one of the most spectacular territories in the world! Ready to experience an adventure that can only be understood by traveling?

The Sun of the West awaits you...

ENTER THE WORLD OF TAD!

Get ready to visit a multitude of cool locations, where you'll jump off huge platforms, climb up buildings, reconstruct part of the past, swim surrounded by piranhas and... You may even encounter an adversary ready to thwart your plans!

SEARCH FOR LOST RELICS AND COLLECT BRUSHES!

Track down locations full of adventures and puzzles to discover incredible treasures and collect all the brushes in each level.

HAVE FUN WITH THE HILARIOUS TAD COMICS!

Follow the adventures of Tad Stones, Sara Lavrof, Jeff and Belzoni through the fun comics you'll find through the game.

[h3]TWO ADVENTURES IN ONE WHERE YOU'LL FIND ALL THE HUMOR AND ADVENTURE OF YOUR FAVORITE CHARACTERS. DON'T MISS OUT![/h3]

supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, French, Italian, German, Portuguese - Portugal
